headline: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Launches Longer Options Trading And Cboe Predicts
summary: Cboe Global Markets is preparing to launch extended trading hours for select mega cap single stock options. The company is also rolling out a new prediction markets product called Cboe Predicts. Both moves are designed to open fresh trading avenues and address demand for off hours access and new contract types. Cboe Global Markets, ticker BATS:CBOE, is adding these products at a time when its stock trades around $277.13, with a return of 104.7% over the past 3 years and 156.4% over 5 years...

headline: Does Cboe (CBOE) Expanding Options Hours and Prediction Markets Redefine Its Diversification Story?
summary: Cboe Global Markets has already introduced extended trading hours for select mega-cap single-stock options, including the Magnificent Seven, and launched its Cboe Predicts prediction markets product with Charles Schwab to broaden its offerings and revenue sources. By stretching trading access around the U.S. cash session and adding a new prediction platform, Cboe is seeking to capture more activity during volatile single-stock moves and diversify beyond traditional options fees.
